tiktok.caption: Missing just 10 days in the market turned $71K into $32K. Your panic is literally the most expensive thing you do.

youtube_short.title: Missing 10 Market Days Costs You $38,000
title_alternatives: 10 Days Out of the Market = Half Your Money Gone
This Is Why You Never Panic-Sell Your Investments
youtube_short.description: What if missing just 10 trading days over 20 years cut your returns nearly in half? Someone who invested $10,000 in the S&P 500 in 2004 and left it alone ended up with $71,750 — but if they panic-sold during crashes and missed just the 10 best days, they only had $32,871. The brutal part: 6 of those 10 best days happened within two weeks of the 10 worst days. The market's biggest recoveries hide inside its biggest crashes, and your fear is costing you $38,000. Automate it, stop watching it, never panic-sell. Follow for more money moves they never taught you. #investing #stockmarket #personalfinance #money #sp500
